ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store model parameters */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folds" (
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fold */,
  "fold_number" INTEGER /* Fold number in the cross-validation process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fold was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fold was last updated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the fold */,
  "split_method" TEXT /* Method used to split the dataset (e.g., K-fold, stratified, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "fold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fold the metric belongs to */,
  "r" REAL /* R value of the model */,
  "r2" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the metric */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "inference_time" REAL /* Average time taken for inference */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (for classification models) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_fold_id FOREIGN KEY ("fold_id") REFERENCES folds ("fold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
